requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 for PV Inverters — DOSM / EDL / MEM Requirements in Laos
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——光伏逆变器IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2——老挝DOSM / EDL / 能源矿产部要求
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——光伏逆變器IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2——寮國DOSM / EDL / 能源礦產部要求

summary.en: DOSM (Department of Standards and Metrology) adopts IEC-based standards for regulated electrical and electronic equipment in Laos, including IEC 62920 (Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment) and IEC 61000-3-2 (Limits for harmonic current emissions for equipment with input current up to 16 A per phase). EDL's technical review for grid-connected solar PV installations references harmonic emission limits consistent with IEC 61000-3-2. IEC 62920 is the dedicated EMC standard for PV power conversion equipment and is the relevant benchmark for conformity documentation when DOSM conducts product-level EMC review. There is no publicly available standalone Laos-specific EMC technical regulation for solar inverters identified as of June 2026; EMC requirements are embedded in IEC standards adopted by DOSM and referenced in EDL grid-connection technical review.
summary.zh: DOSM（标准计量局）针对老挝受监管电气和电子设备采用基于IEC的标准，包括IEC 62920（光伏发电系统——功率变换设备的电磁兼容要求和测试方法）和IEC 61000-3-2（每相输入电流不超过16 A的设备的谐波电流排放限值）。EDL对并网太阳能光伏装置的技术审查引用与IEC 61000-3-2一致的谐波排放限值。IEC 62920是光伏功率变换设备的专用EMC标准，是DOSM进行产品级EMC审查时合格评定文件的相关基准。截至2026年6月，尚未发现可公开获取的老挝专项太阳能逆变器EMC技术法规；EMC要求包含在DOSM采纳的IEC标准及EDL并网技术审查引用的标准中。
summary.zht: DOSM（標準計量局）針對寮國受監管電氣和電子設備採用基於IEC的標準，包括IEC 62920（光伏發電系統——功率轉換設備的電磁相容要求和測試方法）和IEC 61000-3-2（每相輸入電流不超過16 A的設備的諧波電流排放限值）。EDL對併網太陽能光伏裝置的技術審查引用與IEC 61000-3-2一致的諧波排放限值。IEC 62920是光伏功率轉換設備的專用EMC標準，是DOSM進行產品級EMC審查時合格評定文件的相關基準。截至2026年6月，尚未發現可公開取得的寮國專項太陽能逆變器EMC技術法規；EMC要求包含在DOSM採納的IEC標準及EDL併網技術審查引用的標準中。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment (adopted as reference by DOSM for PV inverter conformity in Laos)
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions (equipment with input current up to 16 A per phase) (referenced in EDL grid-connection harmonic requirements)
DOSM (Department of Standards and Metrology, Lao PDR) — regulatory framework for conformity of regulated electrical products, including PV inverters

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC is assessed under GB/T 37408-2021 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), which includes EMC test requirements aligned with China's domestic regulatory framework. EMC testing is performed at CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories. Although IEC 62920 draws on IEC 61000-series test methods that also inform Chinese domestic standards, GB/T 37408 EMC test scope and referenced limits are not harmonised with IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 as applicable in Laos under DOSM's IEC adoption framework. Chinese EMC certificates based solely on GB/T 37408 are not accepted as IEC 62920 or IEC 61000-3-2 compliance evidence for DOSM conformity review or EDL project submissions in Laos.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC依据GB/T 37408-2021（光伏并网逆变器技术要求）进行评估，其中包含与中国国内监管框架相符的EMC测试要求。EMC测试在中国CNAS认可实验室进行。尽管IEC 62920借鉴了同样影响中国国内标准的IEC 61000系列测试方法，但GB/T 37408 EMC测试范围和引用限值未与IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2协调，不被DOSM合格评定审查或老挝EDL项目提交接受为IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2合规证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC依據GB/T 37408-2021（光伏並網逆變器技術要求）進行評估，其中包含與中國國內監管框架相符的EMC測試要求。EMC測試在中國CNAS認可實驗室進行。儘管IEC 62920借鑑了同樣影響中國國內標準的IEC 61000系列測試方法，但GB/T 37408 EMC測試範圍和引用限值未與IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2協調，不被DOSM合格評定審查或寮國EDL項目提交接受為IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2合規證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC test requirements under China's domestic framework

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC testing does not satisfy DOSM's IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 requirements as applicable in Laos. Exporters should obtain: (a) IEC 62920 EMC type-test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory covering the specific inverter model or power-rating family; (b) IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic current emission test report for the model. Note that harmonic test results obtained under Chinese grid conditions (220/380 V) may need to be re-evaluated for Laos's 230/400 V grid conditions — confirm with the EDL project engineer or DOSM technical reviewer whether retesting under Laos grid conditions is required. Submit EMC evidence as part of the DOSM conformity documentation package and EDL project technical review submission.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 37408 EMC测试不满足老挝DOSM适用的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。出口商应取得：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室、涵盖特定逆变器型号或功率等级系列的IEC 62920 EMC型式试验报告；（b）该型号的IEC 61000-3-2谐波电流排放测试报告。注意：在中国电网条件（220/380 V）下取得的谐波测试结果，可能需要针对老挝230/400 V电网条件重新评估——请向EDL项目工程师或DOSM技术审查员确认是否需要在老挝电网条件下重新测试。须将EMC证据作为DOSM合格评定文件包和EDL项目技术审查提交材料的一部分。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 37408 EMC測試不滿足寮國DOSM適用的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。出口商應取得：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室、涵蓋特定逆變器型號或功率等級系列的IEC 62920 EMC型式試驗報告；（b）該型號的IEC 61000-3-2諧波電流排放測試報告。注意：在中國電網條件（220/380 V）下取得的諧波測試結果，可能需要針對寮國230/400 V電網條件重新評估——請向EDL項目工程師或DOSM技術審查員確認是否需要在寮國電網條件下重新測試。須將EMC證據作為DOSM合格評定文件包和EDL項目技術審查提交材料的一部分。

mandatory_status.target: Required for DOSM conformity assessment of regulated PV inverter products and for EDL grid-connection technical review in Laos; IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 are the applicable IEC benchmarks under DOSM's framework
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408 EMC testing supports CQC/CGC voluntary certification in China; not a standalone mandatory market-access requirement for domestic China PV inverters

source.publisher: DOSM (Department of Standards and Metrology), Ministry of Industry and Commerce, Lao PDR

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC certificates do not satisfy DOSM Laos IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 conformity requirements. Obtain IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 type-test reports from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for the specific inverter model before submitting to DOSM conformity review or EDL project technical review. Confirm with DOSM and EDL whether Laos grid voltage conditions (230/400 V) require retesting compared to results obtained under 220/380 V Chinese grid conditions. Laos EMC regulatory requirements may evolve — verify the current DOSM regulated-product list and applicable standards with DOSM directly before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 37408 EMC证书不满足老挝DOSM的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2合格评定要求。在向DOSM合格评定审查或EDL项目技术审查提交前，须从ILAC认可实验室取得特定逆变器型号的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式试验报告。请向DOSM和EDL确认老挝电网电压条件（230/400 V）是否需要相较于中国220/380 V电网条件下的测试结果重新测试。老挝EMC监管要求可能仍在演变——出货前请直接向DOSM核实现行受监管产品清单和适用标准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 37408 EMC證書不滿足寮國DOSM的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2合格評定要求。在向DOSM合格評定審查或EDL項目技術審查提交前，須從ILAC認可實驗室取得特定逆變器型號的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式試驗報告。請向DOSM和EDL確認寮國電網電壓條件（230/400 V）是否需要相較於中國220/380 V電網條件下的測試結果重新測試。寮國EMC監管要求可能仍在演變——出貨前請直接向DOSM核實現行受監管產品清單和適用標準。
